login.title: Sign in
login.legalPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

register.title: Sign up
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.acceptTermsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Service.
register.acceptPrivacyRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.lead: Enter your email and we will send a reset link if an account exists.
forgotPassword.sentStatus: If an account exists for {{email}}, you will receive instructions shortly.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.lead: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm your email
confirmEmail.lead: We sent a confirmation email to {{email}}.
confirmEmail.invalidLink: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
confirmEmail.otpInvalid: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
confirmEmail.resendSent: If an account is pending confirmation, a new email was sent.
